english_presets.stdout:
Review Type Presets:
  runtime_safety        Runtime Safety  [Risk & Resilience]
                        Security, failure handling, input validation, and dependency risk.
                        Includes: security, error_handling, data_validation, dependency
  code_health           Code Health  [Code Quality]
                        Maintainability and cleanup coverage for code that is drifting or getting harder to change.
                        Includes: best_practices, maintainability, dead_code, complexity, regression
  interface_platform    Interface & Platform  [Surface Coverage]
                        Public API quality, compatibility expectations, structural boundaries, and scaling pressure.
                        Includes: api_design, compatibility, architecture, scalability
  product_surface       Product Surface  [Surface Coverage]
                        User-facing interaction quality across usability, accessibility, localization, and docs.
                        Includes: ui_ux, accessibility, localization, documentation
  release_safety        Release Safety  [Risk & Resilience]
                        Regression-oriented checks for tests, compatibility, and failure paths before shipping.
                        Includes: testing, regression, error_handling, compatibility

japanese_presets.stdout:
レビュータイププリセット:
  runtime_safety        ランタイム安全性  [リスクと耐障害性]
                        セキュリティ、障害時の挙動、入力検証、依存関係リスクをまとめて確認します。
                        対象: security, error_handling, data_validation, dependency
  code_health           コード健全性  [コード品質]
                        保守性、不要コード、複雑さ、回帰リスクをまとめて確認します。
                        対象: best_practices, maintainability, dead_code, complexity, regression
  interface_platform    インターフェースとプラットフォーム  [表面領域カバレッジ]
                        API品質、互換性、構造境界、スケーリング圧力をまとめて確認します。
                        対象: api_design, compatibility, architecture, scalability
  product_surface       プロダクト表面品質  [表面領域カバレッジ]
                        使いやすさ、アクセシビリティ、ローカライズ、ドキュメント品質をまとめて確認します。
                        対象: ui_ux, accessibility, localization, documentation
  release_safety        リリース安全性  [リスクと耐障害性]
                        テスト、回帰、エラー処理、互換性を出荷前に重点確認します。
                        対象: testing, regression, error_handling, compatibility

settings.local_http_docs_excerpt:
Use http://127.0.0.1:8765 as the desktop-local API root.

GET /api/backends
GET /api/review-types
GET /api/review-presets
POST /api/recommendations/review-types
GET /api/jobs
POST /api/jobs
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}
POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/cancel
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/report
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/artifacts
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/artifacts/{artifact_key}
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/artifacts/{artifact_key}/raw
GET /api/events
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/events

デスクトップ内ローカルAPIのルートとして http://127.0.0.1:8765 を使用します。

GET /api/backends
GET /api/review-types
GET /api/review-presets
POST /api/recommendations/review-types
GET /api/jobs
POST /api/jobs
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}
POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/cancel
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/report
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/artifacts
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/artifacts/{artifact_key}
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/artifacts/{artifact_key}/raw
GET /api/events
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/events
